archetype: The Performance Pro (Archetype 2) with Jewel & Luxury (Archetype 5) undertones

brand.name: CrewZ
brand.vibe: Garmin meets Apple. Elite, uncompromising, serious performance technology built by Olympians.
brand.emotion: Command-center focus, high visibility, premium athletic tension.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl+ font-bold tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none
rules.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase leading-tight

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. High contrast. Sections must breathe to feel premium.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: bg-[#0A0A0A]/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10 z-50
surface_strategies.cards: Solid Background: bg-[#111111] border border-white/10 hover:border-brand-accent_primary/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(0,122,255,0.1)] transition-all duration-300
surface_strategies.hero_overlay: Gradient Overlay: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0A0A0A] via-[#0A0A0A]/80 to-transparent
surface_strategies.footer: Massive Space: py-32 bg-[#050505] border-t border-white/10

buttons.primary: bg-[#007AFF] text-white font-headings uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-4 px-8 rounded-sm hover:bg-[#3395FF] hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,122,255,0.4)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 font-headings uppercase tracking-widest text-sm py-4 px-8 rounded-sm hover:border-white hover:bg-white/5 transition-all
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-gray-300 font-body text-sm hover:text-white transition-colors

inputs.default: bg-[#111111] border border-white/10 text-white rounded-sm focus:border-[#007AFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF] transition-all

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All interactive elements must shift visually. Cards lift -translate-y-1, borders illuminate.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Fade in and slide up (framer-motion opacity: 0 -> 1, y: 20 -> 0).
motion_and_interactions.image_reveal: Scale down slightly and unblur on scroll.

icons.style: Duotone or bold to match the athletic weight.

hero_background.description: Men rowing boat in water. Use as main hero background with dark gradient overlay.

feature_boat_overhead.description: Five men riding row boat. Good for 'Technology' or 'App' section background.

founder_portrait.description: Man in black vest on water. Use for the Founder / Olympian section.

product_case_placeholder.description: Smartphone cases on dark surface. Use as placeholder for the Speed/Cox/Coach product hardware.

lifestyle_rowing.description: Two people rowing a boat. Use for compare page or testimonials.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use pure white for backgrounds; stick entirely to the dark theme palette (#0A0A0A base).
Ensure the Header is fixed/sticky with backdrop-blur and a subtle bottom border.
Product Pages (Speed, Cox, Coach) must feel like elite hardware spec sheets—use strict grid layouts, 1px borders, and highlight technical metrics.
The 'Compare' page should utilize a robust table component (Shadcn Table) with dark styling.
Use standard semantic HTML sections but heavily styled with Tailwind. Do not overuse Shadcn's generic Card component for layout; build custom HTML bento grids.
All buttons must be sharp (rounded-sm or rounded-none) and uppercase to maintain the athletic/tactical vibe.
Add 'data-testid' to all form elements, CTA buttons, and navigation links.
